brief.premise: A woman in a rust-orange wool coat walks through a quiet autumn park at golden hour. She strolls a tree-lined path, pauses to watch leaves drift down, sits on a weathered wooden bench, and gazes toward the horizon. One recurring character throughout, calm continuous motion, soft natural daylight, no signage, no text, no numerals, no bright light sources, no small handheld props. Every shot includes one short English narration line, five words or fewer.
brief.target_audience: hackathon judges evaluating a real Qwen Cloud production pipeline
brief.title: Autumn Path
brief.visual_style: grounded cinematic realism, soft even golden-hour light, shallow depth of field, gentle camera moves, no text or logos

audio_rules: One English narration line per shot, five words or fewer
Narration only — no dialogue, no music, no SFX
TTS-synthesizable: clear diction, neutral pace, warm tone

beats.name: Sit and settle
beats.objective: Anchor emotional weight in posture and light

beats.name: Gaze toward horizon
beats.objective: Visual reveal of light + distance; emotional legibility

characters.appearance: Woman, 30s, medium-brown wavy hair tied loosely back, fair skin with faint freckles, calm expression. Wears rust-orange wool coat (medium weight, slightly oversized), cream turtleneck, charcoal straight-leg trousers, low brown leather boots.
characters.motivation: To be present in the quiet passage of time
characters.name: Elena
characters.reference_prompt: Caucasian woman 30s, rust-orange wool coat, golden-hour park light, shallow DoF, cinematic realism
characters.voice_direction: Warm, unhurried, mid-tempo, breathy but clear
characters.wardrobe: rust-orange wool coat, cream turtleneck, charcoal trousers, brown leather boots

plan.logline: A woman walks a quiet autumn park at golden hour, pausing to reflect as leaves fall.

shots.action: C01 walks into frame from screen left, stepping onto paved path lined with tall maple and oak trees. Leaves drift gently in background. She walks with relaxed shoulders, hands in coat pockets.

camera.lens: 50mm, shallow depth of field — foreground leaves softly blurred
camera.movement: Slow lateral glide right, matching her pace

continuity.location: Same park path, consistent tree species and paving

start_state.motion: entering frame walking forward at steady pace

continuity.time_of_day: Golden hour — low sun, warm diffuse light, no harsh highlights

shots.location: Tree-lined park path — paved, gravel-shouldered, dappled with long shadows and amber light.
shots.narrative_objective: Establish golden-hour park path, introduce C01 walking into frame from left, coat catching warm light.
shots.negative_prompt: identity drift, extra fingers, deformed face, illegible text, flicker
shots.storyboard_prompt: Cinematic realism, woman in rust-orange wool coat walking into frame left on golden-hour tree-lined park path, soft bokeh foliage, shallow DoF, 50mm lens, warm even light, no text, no logos, no people beyond C01
shots.title: Path entrance
shots.video_prompt: Medium full shot, slow lateral right glide, woman in rust-orange coat walking steadily on paved autumn park path, golden hour light, maple and oak trees overhead, falling leaves visible in background, shallow depth of field, cinematic realism

shots.action: C01 continues walking forward, head slightly lifted. A cluster of amber and crimson leaves detaches above and drifts down just ahead of her.

camera.angle: Slightly low angle to emphasize canopy height
camera.lens: 35mm, shallow DoF — branches softly blurred overhead
camera.movement: Slow push-in toward C01's upper body

end_state.position: same, slight upward tilt of chin

continuity.location: Same park path, same tree species, same light quality
continuity.time_of_day: Golden hour — consistent warmth and shadow length

shots.location: Same park path, slightly tighter framing under denser canopy.
shots.narrative_objective: Emphasize immersion in seasonal atmosphere — light filtering through branches, leaves swirling.
shots.negative_prompt: identity drift, extra fingers, deformed face, illegible text, flicker
shots.storyboard_prompt: Cinematic realism, woman in rust-orange coat walking under autumn tree canopy, golden light filtering through, leaves drifting down, medium shot, shallow DoF, 35mm lens, warm tone, no text or logos
shots.title: Canopy walk
shots.video_prompt: Medium shot, slow push-in, woman in rust-orange coat walking under autumn canopy, sunlight dappling her shoulders, several leaves drifting down in front of her, shallow depth of field, cinematic realism, golden-hour lighting

shots.action: C01 halts mid-step. Her gaze lifts. A single large maple leaf spirals down in front of her, landing softly on the path near her boot.

camera.lens: 85mm, shallow DoF — background foliage melts into warm bokeh
camera.movement: Very slight slow zoom-in on face

continuity.location: Same park path, same light, same trees
continuity.time_of_day: Golden hour — consistent color temperature and direction

shots.location: Same path, same lighting — now centered on her stillness.
shots.narrative_objective: Break motion to spotlight attention — she stops, watches a single leaf descend.
shots.negative_prompt: identity drift, extra fingers, deformed face, illegible text, flicker
shots.storyboard_prompt: Cinematic realism, woman in rust-orange coat paused mid-autumn park path, looking up as single maple leaf falls, medium close-up, shallow DoF, golden-hour light, no text, no logos
shots.title: Mid-path pause
shots.video_prompt: Medium close-up, slight slow zoom-in, woman in rust-orange coat standing still on paved park path, looking up as one large amber maple leaf spirals down in front of her, shallow depth of field, warm golden light, cinematic realism

shots.action: C01 resumes walking, now angled toward a weathered wooden bench set slightly off-path to the right. She takes three deliberate steps toward it.

camera.angle: Slightly high angle to include bench in frame
camera.lens: 40mm, shallow DoF — bench softly defined, background trees out of focus
camera.movement: Slow lateral glide right, following her turn

end_state.position: three paces from bench, facing it

continuity.location: Same park path, same bench, same lighting
continuity.time_of_day: Golden hour — consistent shadows cast by bench legs

shots.location: Same path, bench now visible — rustic, unpainted pine, slightly moss-touched legs.
shots.narrative_objective: Introduce weathered wooden bench as destination — visual anchor for next beat.
shots.negative_prompt: identity drift, extra fingers, deformed face, illegible text, flicker
shots.storyboard_prompt: Cinematic realism, woman in rust-orange coat walking toward weathered wooden bench on autumn park path, golden hour light, wide medium shot, shallow DoF, no text, no logos
shots.title: Bench approach
shots.video_prompt: Wide medium shot, slow lateral right glide, woman in rust-orange coat walking three steps toward rustic wooden bench on paved park path, fallen leaves around bench, shallow depth of field, warm golden light, cinematic realism

shots.action: C01 sits on the bench, smoothing her coat over her thighs. She rests hands lightly on knees. A breeze stirs her hair slightly.

camera.angle: Eye level, slightly angled to show profile and bench edge
camera.lens: 50mm, shallow DoF — bench texture visible but soft, background trees out of focus

end_state.motion: still, slight breeze movement in hair

continuity.location: Same bench, same path, same lighting
continuity.time_of_day: Golden hour — consistent rim light on her hair and coat collar

shots.location: Same bench, same path, same light — now focused on her seated posture.
shots.narrative_objective: Physical grounding — she sits, exhales, lets coat settle.
shots.negative_prompt: identity drift, extra fingers, deformed face, illegible text, flicker
shots.storyboard_prompt: Cinematic realism, woman in rust-orange coat seated on weathered wooden bench in autumn park, golden hour light, medium shot, shallow DoF, no text, no logos
shots.title: Settle on bench
shots.video_prompt: Medium shot, slow push-in, woman in rust-orange coat seated on rustic wooden bench in park, hands resting on knees, breeze stirring hair slightly, shallow depth of field, warm golden light, cinematic realism

shots.action: C01 turns her head slowly right, eyes lifting toward horizon. Sunlight catches the rim of her coat collar and hair. Distant treeline glows amber.

camera.lens: 85mm, shallow DoF — horizon softly rendered, foreground sharp
camera.movement: Very slow tilt up from eyes to horizon line

continuity.location: Same bench, same path, same lighting — now with visible horizon glow
continuity.time_of_day: Golden hour — sun low, diffused, no glare or bloom

shots.location: Same bench, same path — now emphasizing depth and distance.
shots.narrative_objective: Emotional and visual culmination — her gaze follows light toward distant treeline; sun glows softly beyond.
shots.negative_prompt: identity drift, extra fingers, deformed face, illegible text, flicker
shots.storyboard_prompt: Cinematic realism, woman in rust-orange coat seated on wooden bench gazing toward amber-lit horizon in autumn park, medium close-up, shallow DoF, golden-hour light, no text, no logos
shots.title: Horizon gaze
shots.video_prompt: Medium close-up, slow tilt up from eyes to horizon, woman in rust-orange coat seated on rustic bench gazing right, distant treeline glowing amber, shallow depth of field, warm golden light, cinematic realism

plan.synopsis: Over 24 seconds, six cinematic shots trace a woman’s unhurried journey along a tree-lined park path at golden hour. She moves with quiet intention—walking, pausing, sitting, gazing—each shot bound by consistent character, lighting, location, and gentle motion. Warm, soft natural light bathes the scene; shallow depth of field and subtle camera movement reinforce intimacy and stillness. No text, signage, logos, or handheld props appear. Every shot includes one five-word-or-fewer English narration line.
plan.title: Autumn Path
visual_rules: Soft even golden-hour light (no direct sun flares or bright sources)
Gentle camera moves: slow push-ins, lateral glides, or slight tilts — never whip pans or drones
No text, numerals, logos, signage, reflections of text, or HUD elements
One primary location: paved tree-lined park path with weathered wooden bench and mature deciduous trees
Consistent character appearance and wardrobe across all shots
